ROLES.CONFIRM_MSG_DEACTIVATE_USERS: This role has {{count}} user(s) assigned. Deactivating it will suspend all these users from the system, terminate their active sessions, and revoke access. Are you sure?

ROLES.CONFIRM_MSG_ACTIVATE_SIMPLE: Are you sure you want to activate the role "{{name}}"?
ROLES.CONFIRM_MSG_DELETE_USERS: ⚠️ This role has {{count}} active user(s) assigned. Deleting it will suspend all these users, unassign them, and terminate their sessions. This action cannot be undone.
ROLES.CONFIRM_MSG_DELETE_SIMPLE: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the role "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
ROLES.SNACK_CLONED: Role cloned and permissions copied successfully.
ROLES.ERR_CLONE_PERM: Role created, but failed to clone permissions.
ROLES.ERR_FETCH_PERM: Role created, but failed to fetch permissions for cloning.

HERO.DESCRIPTION: One platform. Expert doctors, secure records, medical travel and a dedicated Healthcare Buddy built around you.

ABOUT.TITLE: Welcome to
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Your health deserves the best care. We connect you with trusted doctors and healthcare services whenever you need them.

FEATURES.TITLE: Everything you need for
FEATURES.DESCRIPTION: A complete digital healthcare ecosystem designed around the patient six pillars, one platform.

ONLINE.TITLE: Online Consultation
ONLINE.DESC: Meet certified doctors through secure video consultations and receive expert medical advice from anywhere.

TRAVEL.TITLE: Medical Travel Assistance
TRAVEL.DESC: Book transportation for hospital visits and medical appointments directly through the platform.

BUDDY.TITLE: Healthcare Buddy
BUDDY.DESC: A dedicated companion who assists patients with appointments, documentation, travel, and ongoing support.

RECORDS.TITLE: Secure Health Records
RECORDS.DESC: All patient data is encrypted and securely stored with advanced privacy protection.

RESPONSE.TITLE: Fast Response
RESPONSE.DESC: Quick appointment scheduling and rapid support whenever you need medical assistance.

SUPPORT.TITLE: 24/7 Support
SUPPORT.DESC: Round-the-clock healthcare support for patients and caregivers.

SPECIALTIES.TITLE: We treat what
SPECIALTIES.DESCRIPTION: From chronic conditions to everyday wellness find the right specialist for every concern.

HOSPITALS.TITLE: 100+ trusted hospitals,
HOSPITALS.CARD_DESC: Multi-specialty care with NABH accreditation and on-site SynapseMD coordination.

DOCTORS.TITLE: Consult India's
DOCTORS.DESCRIPTION: Hand-picked, board-certified doctors with an average of 15+ years' experience matched to your case.

RIYA.TEXT: SynapseMD made it incredibly easy to consult a specialist while caring for my mother. The Healthcare Buddy was a lifesaver.

AHMED.TEXT: The platform is seamless and the doctors are exceptional. I got a second opinion from a top cardiologist within 48 hours.

MEERA.TEXT: From booking to report delivery, everything was handled professionally. The 24/7 support gave me real peace of mind.

CONTACT.TITLE: Tell us how we
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Share your details and our team will reach out within 24 hours.

PRICING.TITLE: Choose the care level
PRICING.DISCLAIMER: Every patient case is carefully reviewed by our India Case Management Team before being matched with the most suitable specialist.

FOOTER.TAGLINE: Connecting patients with trusted healthcare anytime, anywhere.

SO.TERMS_OF_SERVICE_DESC: By submitting this second opinion request, you authorize the medical platform and the assigned consulting specialist to access the patient's uploaded health records and medical documents for evaluation purposes.
SO.REFUND_POLICY_DESC: Requests for refunds can be made up to 24 hours after order creation, provided that no specialist has begun reviewing the case. Once a specialist is assigned and case review has started, refunds cannot be processed.

ONBOARDING.ADD_AT_LEAST_ONE: Please add at least one {{stepName}} before proceeding.
ONBOARDING.FAILED_SAVE_STEP: Failed to save {{stepName}} data. Please try again.
ONBOARDING.TERMS_INTRO: Welcome to our application. By completing your onboarding, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. Please review them carefully.
ONBOARDING.TERMS_SEC1_DESC: You certify that all information provided during this onboarding process is accurate, complete, and up-to-date. Providing false information may result in account termination.
ONBOARDING.TERMS_SEC2_DESC: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
ONBOARDING.TERMS_SEC3_DESC: This service is intended for clinical onboarding and coordination. Any unauthorized use, data extraction, or abuse of the service is strictly prohibited.
ONBOARDING.TERMS_SEC4_DESC: We provide the system on an "as-is" basis. While we strive for absolute accuracy, we are not liable for service interruptions or data accuracy errors beyond our direct control.
ONBOARDING.TERMS_SEC5_DESC: For any queries regarding these terms, please contact support.
ONBOARDING.PRIVACY_INTRO: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you share with us during the onboarding process.
ONBOARDING.PRIVACY_SEC1_DESC: We collect personal identifiers (name, email, phone number, address) and health-related details (medications, allergies, insurance policies) to facilitate patient care and profile management.
ONBOARDING.PRIVACY_SEC2_DESC: Your details are processed to store your patient record, coordinate care, and ensure billing/insurance validation. We only process data in accordance with local healthcare regulations.
ONBOARDING.PRIVACY_SEC3_DESC: We do not sell your personal data. Data is only shared with authorized medical personnel, privacy officers, or as required by law.
ONBOARDING.PRIVACY_SEC4_DESC: We enforce industry-standard security protocols, encryption, and access controls to keep your health data protected at all times.
ONBOARDING.PRIVACY_SEC5_DESC: You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. Please reach out to our privacy officer for assistance.
ONBOARDING.UPLOAD_IMAGE_ERROR: Please upload your profile image before proceeding.
ONBOARDING.FILL_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Please fill in all required fields before proceeding.
